macro.title: Stephen Brobeck: Why decoupling commissions failed to lower housing costs
macro.what: The op-ed says rates stayed near 5% to 6% as buyers expected seller-paid real estate commissions, limiting negotiation after the settlement.

macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
